data.title: Wire check_cycle_at_level into add_dependency() integration
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify add_dependency() in plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py to call check_cycle_at_level() when a hierarchy level can be determined from the already-integrated resolve_hierarchy_link() call (from S2). If a cycle or self-loop is detected at the resolved level, raise CyclicDependencyError before writing any LINK event.

## Implementation Steps
After S2's integration of resolve_hierarchy_link() in add_dependency(), the function has access to the resolved (source, target) pair and their ticket_type/level. Modify add_dependency() to:

1. After the resolve_hierarchy_link() call (from S2), read the resolved source ticket's ticket_type to determine the level (e.g., "epic", "story", "task"). This is available from _reduce_ticket(source_dir).get("ticket_type", "").lower() on the resolved source.

2. If the resolved source has a non-empty ticket_type AND check_cycle_at_level(resolved_source_id, resolved_target_id, level, tracker_dir) returns True:
   - Raise CyclicDependencyError with a clear message:
     - Cycle: "Adding {resolved_source_id} → {resolved_target_id} ({relation}) would create a cycle at {level} level"
     - Self-loop: "Adding {resolved_source_id} → {resolved_source_id} ({relation}) is a self-referential dependency at {level} level"

3. The existing check_would_create_cycle() call at line 581 is PRESERVED unchanged for the raw (unresolved) link case. The new check_cycle_at_level() runs as an additional guard on the resolved pair.

4. check_cycle_at_level() is not called when the resolved source's ticket_type is empty (fail-open for tickets with missing type).

## Files
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py (modify — update add_dependency())

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level passes (GREEN)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py::test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level -x
- [ ] test_add_dependency_raises_on_self_loop_at_level passes (GREEN)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py::test_add_dependency_raises_on_self_loop_at_level -x
- [ ] Existing check_would_create_cycle tests pass without modification (non-regression SC)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py -k "cycle" -x
- [ ] check_cycle_at_level is called within add_dependency() body
  Verify: grep -q "check_cycle_at_level" plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py
- [ ] LINK event is NOT written when cycle detected (no spurious .json files in source dir on cycle)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py::test_add_dependency_raises_on_cycle_at_level -x
